info.description: Home page stat counters, e.g. "29+ Years of Experience"

value.description: Fixed number to display. Leave empty if you set "Calculate from founding year" below instead.

foundingYearForAutoCount.description: If set, this stat's number is calculated automatically as (current year - this year) and updates on its own every year — use this for "Years of Experience" instead of typing a number in Value. Leave empty for stats that use a fixed number.
